summary: Iteration 28: Comprehensive testing of Visual Page Builder CMS feature. All 39 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified all major features including 14 builder layouts, 5 legacy layouts, 9 block types, zone-based editing, and public page rendering.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: PagesManager.js has good data-testid coverage for all interactive elements
PageBuilder.js correctly handles zone-based block management with add/edit/delete/reorder
BlockConfigModal.js provides appropriate config forms for each block type
LayoutRenderer.js properly renders all 14 builder layouts with correct zone mapping
BlockRenderer.js handles all 9 block types including service_list and gallery auto-population
DynamicPage.js correctly routes to LayoutRenderer for builder layouts and legacy layouts
Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data, test pages cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual Page Builder CMS feature fully tested and working. Admin can create pages with 14 builder layouts (Full Width, Boxed, Split Screen, Grid 2x2, Masonry, List, Carousel, Two Column, Three Column, Profile, Card Based, Hero Banner, Sidebar, Landing Page) and 5 legacy layouts (Default, About/Bio, Services Grid, Gallery Albums, Full Content). Each builder layout has zones where admins can add 9 block types (Rich Text, Image, Video, Service List, Gallery, Profile Card, Button, Separator, Custom HTML). Blocks can be reordered and deleted. Pages save via PUT /api/admin/nav-pages/{id} with zones data. Public pages render correctly via DynamicPage.js -> LayoutRenderer.js -> BlockRenderer.js. Service Read More links navigate to /service/:id correctly.

admin_pages_manager.custom_pages_tab: PASS - Shows list of custom pages

layout_selector.layout_selection: PASS - Clicking layout updates UI and shows appropriate editor

builder_layouts_zones.zone_add_block_buttons: PASS - Each zone has Add Block button
builder_layouts_zones.zone_labels: PASS - Zones display correct labels from layoutDefinitions

block_picker.block_type_icons: PASS - Each block type has icon and description

block_management.add_block: PASS - Blocks added to correct zone
block_management.edit_block: PASS - Edit button opens config modal

legacy_layouts.layout_1_about_bio: PASS - Shows preset info + image upload

page_save.zones_persistence: PASS - Zones with blocks saved correctly

public_rendering.layout_renderer: PASS - LayoutRenderer component renders builder layouts
public_rendering.button_block: PASS - Button block rendered with correct text

service_read_more_links.service_detail_page: PASS - Service detail page renders correctly
